nasb.text: The violence of the wicked will drag them away, Because they refuse to act with justice.

esv.text: The violence of the wicked will sweep them away, because they refuse to do what is just.

cnv.text: 惡人的暴行必拖累自己； 因為他們不肯秉行公正。

ccb.text: 恶人的暴力必毁灭自己， 因为他们行事不公不义。

csbs.text: 恶人的暴行必拖垮自己， 因为他们不肯施行公正。
